settings.heading: Custom shirts and branded apparel for Dallas organizations.
settings.lead: Order custom t-shirts, company apparel, school spirit wear and event merchandise for Dallas-area groups.
settings.body:
L F Graphco supports Dallas businesses, schools, churches, restaurants, medical offices and sports teams with apparel programs that can scale from quote requests to ecommerce sales.

Request pricing for custom shirts, embroidered polos, hoodies, safety apparel and promotional products.
